name: Targeted inbox search
description: User asks about a specific person's recent email. Agent should call find_workspace with a natural-language query — NOT triage_inbox (which is for morning routines, not targeted lookups). Catches a class of bug where the model picks the wrong workspace AgentTool.

parts.text: did Alex email me about the project this week?

args.query: did Alex email me about the project this week?
